title: Suggested Learning Resource Flow for Module 5: Data Structures & Applications
description: A flowchart showing the recommended sequence and relationships between different types of learning resources for mastering Data Structures and their Applications.
relationships: Start with Foundation Textbooks to build core knowledge, then use Algorithm Visualization Tools to understand concepts. Parallelly, engage with Interactive Online Courses. Afterwards, apply knowledge on Coding Practice Platforms. Use Community Forums for support throughout. Consult Lecture Notes for academic depth and finish with Project-Based Tutorials for real-world application.
